name: deepplan
description: Deep plan review before AI agents execute.

interface.longDescription: DeepPlan helps agents turn first-draft plans into evidence-backed execution plans by comparing alternatives, critiquing risks, eliminating weaker options, and defining validation gates before implementation starts.
defaultPrompt: Use $deepplan to converge this plan before implementation.
Use $deepplan to compare alternatives and produce one main plan plus one backup.
Use $deepplan to check whether this plan has missing risks or a cleaner option.
